contentBlocks.original:
कौसल्या सुप्रजाराम पूर्वा संध्याप्रवर्तते ।
उत्तिष्ठ नरशार्दूल कर्तव्यं देवमान्हिकम् ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kausalyā suprajārāma pūrvā saṃdhyāpravartate .
uttiṣṭha naraśārdūla kartavyaṃ devamānhikam ..
contentBlocks.translation: O good offspring of Kausalya, Rama, the yester-evening (and night) is creeping away (into dawn), awake, the greatest of beings, may you perform the daily duties of your godly status.
contentBlocks.meanings: कौसल्या (kausalyā) – Kausalya's; सुप्रज (supraja) – good offspring (su:good | praja:offspring); राम (rāma) – Rama; पूर्वा (pūrvā) – yester-evening; संध्या (saṃdhyā) – twilight; प्रवर्तते (pravartate) – is creeping; उत्तिष्ठ (uttiṣṭha) – awake; नरशार्दूल (naraśārdūla) – tiger among men (nara:man | śārdūla:tiger); कर्तव्यम् (kartavyam) – duties; देवमान्हिकम् (devamānhikam) – daily godly duties (deva:godly | mānhikam:daily duties);
